goal: Audit the runtime control plane and safety boundary from independent evidence

tasks.task: Read agent_forge/runtime/config.py and agent_forge/runtime/clarification.py exactly once each, then report their execution-budget and clarification control states with concrete file references. Return the artifact immediately after those two reads.

Read agent_forge/safety/command_policy.py and agent_forge/safety/sandbox.py, then report their enforced boundaries and explicit limitations with concrete file references. Use at most two read calls and then return the artifact.
